title: thalictrum flavum subsp. belgicum
intro: Thalictrum flavum subsp. belgicum, also known as the meadow rue, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of meadow rue include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of meadow rue can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
